title: The Sunny Pushes Deeper
description: On pages 20–23, this part follows Nami, Narrator, Unknown person #1, Franky, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. The core story beat is the sunny pushes deeper.
scene: The scene centers on the sunny pushes deeper, with Nami, Narrator, Unknown person #1, Franky, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I see... so they're mystery currents...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why you should just shut up and let me handle these things in the first place!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Care for a song, Nami- San?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nam! While you've been explaining the theory, it looks as though we've almost reached the current!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 04?!! Let's see the mystery current, then!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's it look like?! A current flowing down to the ocean depths...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa!! Is that it?! that's amazing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not half bad work, nature!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What...? Is that...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...that's the downward current plume...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's almost like a gigantic...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...undersea waterfall!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The water's falling all the way down to the sea bottom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look how fast it's going...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take a proper look down there!! There's a monster below!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Incredible...!! The sheer magnitude of the flow is breathtaking!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Awesomeeeeeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How many hundreds of metres across must it be...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's one thing to hear about it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...but seeing it first-hand is another matter entirely!! Yo40ho...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't see the bottom!! It's just pitch blackness down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're Doomee EED!!! At that speed, we'll be smashed against the seabed for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is this really going to be all right?! Following this current...!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Don't you worry about the ship!! The sunny is the ultimate craft, hewn from the legendary Adam tree!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have a few more interesting

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Turn back, right now!!! We're all in mortal danger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I forgot you were still here

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never heard that that thing was living in these waters!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That legendary demon that roams the vast ocean, never tiring of the slaughter it leaves in its wake...!! The enemy of all humanity!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That beast is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaA! Aaa!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the krakeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's crushing all those ships in its tentacles!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must have taken all the ships that set out in the past few days!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look how huge it is!!! It's a real monster squid!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't know where it came from... but it must be feeding on all the ships that try to take this current down to the sea depths!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've never heard about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE!! I don't want to die any more than you do!! Just turn back!! If we wait it out for a few days, I'm sure that thing will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, shut up already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've just had a great idea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's make that thing our pet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Q:...Ah- in fact...

summary: The Sunny Pushes Deeper. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
